_note: Updated daily at noon by the analytics agent. Plain language — no jargon.

priorities.title: Track whether the AI's room suggestions are actually helpful — accept, tweak, or reject
priorities.note: Room environment suggestions now log a durable helpfulness record per generation. Each preview build gets a stable suggestion id, tracks outcome (accept / tweak / reject), context, time-to-decision, preview/open-game inspections, lightweight reason codes, latency/errors/cancellations/crash-near-AI-use signals, and a persistence check on later room saves. Rollups now include explicit request/view/decision/persist funnels, denominators, and low-sample warnings.
priorities.proposed_solution: Keep using the new `room.environment.ai_helpfulness` ledger and `/environment/feedback` hook as the base contract. Next reporting work should read those persisted suggestion records directly instead of falling back to raw invocation counts.

priorities.title: Automate the daily dashboard refresh so it runs without anyone pressing a button
priorities.note: The automated system went live today. Every dashboard — including this one — now updates itself each day at noon. No manual work required.
priorities.proposed_solution: Keep verifying the daily automated dashboard refresh and extend the runbook when new metrics or pages are added.

actions.name: Metric Audit
actions.description: Review what is measured, what is missing, and what has misleading denominators — with sample sizes stated.

actions.name: Funnel Report
actions.description: Activation funnel snapshot (open → first entity placed → first export) with denominators and confidence context.

actions.name: Competitive Scan
actions.description: Structured competitor intelligence report: new entrants, community sentiment shifts, AI tool developments.
actions.trigger: Quarterly or when a new entrant is spotted

actions.name: Copilot Eval Report
actions.description: Acceptance, revision, and discard rates with credible intervals — never point estimates without denominators.
actions.trigger: After any model version or prompt architecture change

opportunities.title: Define the north-star outcome + leading indicators for creator success (starting with finished rooms per active user per month)
opportunities.note: Rooms/user/month is only meaningful once we define “finished room” and the product loop. Pre-public-release it will be ~0 (no external users), which is expected; the point is to start clean instrumentation at the first public release.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Define and instrument rooms exported per active user per month as the north star starting at the first public release.
opportunities.solution: North-star (outcome): finished rooms per active user per month. Define “finished room” as an explicit export/release marker (e.g., Room Exported v1 OR Room Published) with a stable room_id, project_id, user_id, timestamp; count unique finished room_ids per user per month. Pair with leading indicators tracked from day 1: Activation (% new users reaching first meaningful success: create room → place required entities → first export/playtest), Engagement (weekly active creators + median active days/week), Quality/success proxies (% exports passing validation with no errors, time-to-first-export, % exported rooms re-opened for edits within 7d). Instrument core events: project_created, room_created, room_exported/published, playtest_started, validation_failed (with error codes), room_opened.

opportunities.title: Write clear privacy notices before we start tracking individual user behaviour
opportunities.note: We can't track what specific people do until we tell them we're doing it and get their agreement. Legal needs to sign off first. On hold until that conversation happens.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Partner with Legal on consent copy and lawful basis, then enable individual-level tracking only after disclosure is approved.

opportunities.title: Choose a privacy-respecting analytics service for when the tool goes public
opportunities.note: Not needed before launch. We'll revisit this when the first external release is close.
opportunities.proposed_solution: Before launch, shortlist a privacy-respecting analytics vendor and fold it into the tracking plan with Legal sign-off.
